member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.HostedTelegramBotInfo
member.summary: Implementation of that provides bot information. Contains metadata about the Telegram bot including user details and service provider for wider filterring abilities

member.summary: Implementation of that provides bot information. Contains metadata about the Telegram bot including user details and service provider for wider filterring abilities

member.summary: Provides access to services of this Hosted telegram bot

member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.ITelegramBotHostBuilder
member.summary: Represents a hosted telegram bots and services builder that helps manage configuration, logging, lifetime, and more.

member.summary: Gets a central location for sharing state between components during the host building process.

member.summary: Gets the set of key/value configuration properties.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.ITelegramBotHostBuilder.Environment
member.summary: Gets the information about the hosting environment an application is running in.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.ITelegramBotHostBuilder.Logging
member.summary: Gets a collection of logging providers for the application to compose. This is useful for adding new logging providers.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.ITelegramBotHostBuilder.Metrics
member.summary: Gets a builder that allows enabling metrics and directing their output.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.ITelegramBotHostBuilder.Services
member.summary: Gets a collection of services for the application to compose. This is useful for adding user provided or framework provided services.

member.name: T:Telegrator.HostBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for to configure Telegrator.

member.name: F:Telegrator.HostBuilderExtensions.HandlersCollectionPropertyKey
member.summary: The key used to store the in the builder properties.

member.name: M:Telegrator.HostBuilderExtensions.AddTelegrator(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,Telegrator.TelegratorOptions,Telegrator.Core.IHandlersCollection)
member.summary: Registers Telegrator in DI container and returns ITelegramBotHostBuilder for further configuration. If options are not provided, it will attempt to bind them from configuration using the "Telegrator" section or "TelegratorOptions" as fallback. If handlers collection is not provided, a default HostHandlersCollection will be created and registered.

member.name: M:Telegrator.HostBuilderExtensions.ConfigureTelegrator(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,Telegrator.TelegratorOptions,Telegrator.Core.IHandlersCollection,System.Action{Telegrator.Hosting.TelegramBotHostBuilder})
member.summary: Registers Telegrator in DI container and returns ITelegramBotHostBuilder for further configuration. If options are not provided, it will attempt to bind them from configuration using the "Telegrator" section or "TelegratorOptions" as fallback. If handlers collection is not provided, a default HostHandlersCollection will be created and registered.

member.name: M:Telegrator.HostBuilderExtensions.ConfigureTelegrator(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder,Telegrator.TelegratorOptions,Telegrator.Core.IHandlersCollection,System.Action{Telegrator.Hosting.TelegramBotHostBuilder})
member.summary: Registers Telegrator in DI container and returns ITelegramBotHostBuilder for further configuration. If options are not provided, it will attempt to bind them from configuration using the "Telegrator" section or "TelegratorOptions" as fallback. If handlers collection is not provided, a default HostHandlersCollection will be created and registered.

member.name: M:Telegrator.HostBuilderExtensions.WithPolling(Telegrator.Hosting.ITelegramBotHostBuilder)
member.summary: Registers Telegrator and configures it to receive updates via long-polling.
Replaces TelegramBotHostBuilder. Configures DI, options, and handlers.

member.summary: Provides extension methods for logging Telegrator-related information.
